# About Our Firm
ECA TAX AND LEGAL and ECA S.A., formerly Ernst & Young Cameroon and ECA-Ernst & Young Cameroon, are leading firms in tax, legal, and audit services, offering expertise in M&A, international tax, and accounting solutions across Africa. With over 40 years of combined experience, our dedicated team of professionals provides global solutions to meet the diverse needs of our clients, recognized by multinational companies across the continent.
[Book Consultation](https://www.ecaconseils.com/contact)[Learn More](https://www.ecaconseils.com/about#Achievements)

## The Story Behind our Company
ECA TAX & LEGAL was founded in 2011 following Ernst & Young's return to Cameroon and a merger with a local firm, while ECA S.A. has been operating since 1984. Both entities joined the Ernst & Young network in 2011, adopting the names "Ernst & Young Cameroon SARL" and "ECA-Ernst & Young Cameroon S.A." respectively, before rebranding to ECA TAX & LEGAL and ECA S.A. in October 2023, without any change in the continuity of their activities and in the provision of services to their clients.
